content: I was cleaning near the main gate around 3:00 PM when I saw a man in a bright blue jacket pulling Arjun Mehta towards a black SUV. He had a cloth over his face, but his voice sounded familiar. Arjun was screaming, but the man slapped him and pushed him inside. The SUV drove off fast. I ran to the principal’s office but couldn’t stop them. The man wore blue — I’m sure of it. I didn’t see the other man. I didn’t know who it was, but I thought maybe someone from the staff? I told the police the same thing. I didn’t lie. I saw the blue jacket.
